name: Satori Resources Inc.
summary: Satori Resources Inc., a mining exploration company, explores for and develops mineral properties in Canada. Its principal project is the Tartan Lake gold mine project that consists of 20 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 2,670 hectares located to the northeast of the town of Flin Flon, Manitoba. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
